name_en: Name: By The Way Boston Mini Bag
name_cn:
Name: By The Way Boston Mini Bag
Quality: Original Order Quality
Model: 8881
Color: Mint Green
Size: 17×8×12cm
Calfskin and snake skin lettering, very soft to the touch. Features FENDI ROMA embossing, hard structure, and a glass handle, with a zipper closure. Large capacity with an interior pocket.
